parameters.query:
SELECT
  ucp.organization_id,
  ucp.dimension,
  ucp.used,
  ucp.total_available,
  CASE WHEN ucp.total_available > 0
    THEN ROUND((ucp.used::numeric / ucp.total_available) * 100)
    ELSE 0
  END AS usage_percent,
  ucp.bolt_on_remaining,
  ucp.overage,
  ucp.overage_rate_zar,
  o.name AS org_name,
  ts.current_period_start
FROM usage_current_period ucp
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = ucp.organization_id
JOIN tenant_subscriptions ts ON ts.organization_id = ucp.organization_id
  AND ts.status IN ('active', 'trialing')
WHERE ucp.total_available > 0
  AND ucp.total_available < 999999
ORDER BY usage_percent DESC;

INSERT INTO usage_alerts (organization_id, dimension, threshold_percent, billing_period, is_sent, sent_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.organization_id }}',
  '{{ $json.dimension }}',
  {{ $json.threshold_percent }},
  '{{ $json.billing_period }}',
  true,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (organization_id, dimension, threshold_percent, billing_period)
DO UPDATE SET is_sent = true, sent_at = NOW()
WHERE usage_alerts.is_sent = false
RETURNING id, organization_id, dimension, threshold_percent;
